entrypoints.responsibility: CLI entrypoints and hub-management commands that choose the runtime path for client, server, assistant, diagnostics, skills, and plugins.

configuration-doctor.responsibility: Loads, normalizes, and validates runtime configuration with field-table driven YAML/env merge and starter-environment diagnostics.

client-tui.responsibility: Terminal UI flow and reusable HTTP/SSE client behavior for chat.

server-chat-pipeline.responsibility: Server bootstrap, API routing, chat execution, semantic-memory-aware prompt assembly, and provider-model discovery endpoints.

auth-plugin-loading.responsibility: Enforces API auth policy, loopback dashboard exceptions, and plugin skill/MCP paths inside trusted boundaries.

extensions-tools.responsibility: Builds unified skill/plugin/MCP snapshots, mirrors runtime skills into the workspace, and exposes tools to the agent loop.

workspace-data.responsibility: Persists sessions, transcripts, projects, usage, schedules, and shared runtime state as local workspace files.

automation-gateway-browser.responsibility: Runs background agent jobs, channel and report surfaces, schedule/ops automation, and browser orchestration outside the chat request lifecycle.

external-integrations.responsibility: Bridges TARS to host launchd services, browser relay traffic, human OTP waits, provider credential strategies, and provider-specific transport adapters.

project-autopilot-dashboard.responsibility: Manages project briefs, workflow policy, board and activity documents, autopilot supervision, and dashboard rendering.

project-swarm-dogfooding.responsibility: Documents how the bundled project workflow skills align with the current autopilot implementation and where gaps remain.

skillhub-distribution.responsibility: Searches the remote TARS Hub, installs or updates skills/plugins into the workspace, and records installed registry state.

semantic-memory.responsibility: Indexes explicit memories, compaction summaries, and project documents into embeddings and injects relevant recall into prompts and tools.
